dhl.title: DHL Shipping
dhl.secretPlaceholder: Already saved – leave blank to keep
dhl.storeCredentialsRequired: DHL is not configured. Production mode requires your own DHL credentials. Please configure DHL in shipping settings.
dhl.productionNotice: 🔴 Production Mode: Real DHL shipments via your DHL business account
dhl.sandboxNotice: 🟡 Sandbox Mode: Test environment, no real shipments
dhl.responsibilityNotice: DHL shipping is processed through your own DHL business account. Shipping costs and billing run directly through your DHL account.
dhl.requirementsNotice: You need a DHL business account, API credentials, and a matching billing number.
dhl.billingNumberHelp: You can find the billing number in the DHL business portal under your booked products. It must match the selected DHL product (e.g., DHL Paket National).
dhl.liveCostWarning: You are about to create a real DHL label via your DHL business account. This may incur shipping costs at DHL. Continue?
dhl.connectionSuccess: DHL connection successful! (no label created, no costs)
dhl.clientIdMissing: Client ID is missing. Please enter your Client ID from DHL Developer Portal.
dhl.clientSecretMissing: Client Secret is missing. Please enter your Client Secret from DHL Developer Portal.
dhl.simpleModeHint: You don't need your own DHL Developer Portal account. markt.ma provides the technical DHL API connection. You only need your DHL business customer credentials and billing number.
dhl.advancedApiCredentialsHint: Only required if you want to use your own DHL Developer Portal credentials.
dhl.productionCostWarning: Live shipping can create real shipping labels. Shipping costs will be charged to your DHL business customer contract.
dhl.liveLabelConfirm: You are about to create a DHL shipping label for this order. In live mode, this may incur shipping costs through your DHL business customer contract. Continue?
dhl.liveLabelSandbox: Create DHL test label in Sandbox? No real costs will be incurred.
dhl.liveLabelProduction: You are about to create a real DHL shipping label. This may incur shipping costs through your DHL business customer contract. Continue?
dhl.invalidClient: API credentials are wrong or not activated. Check Client ID / Client Secret.
dhl.invalidGrant: DHL business customer credentials are wrong. Check username / password.
dhl.platformCredentialsMissing: Live shipping is not yet activated. markt.ma needs DHL Production API approval for this.
dhl.invalidBillingNumber: The DHL billing number is invalid. It must consist of 14 digits, e.g. EKP + procedure + participation.
dhl.pickupNotAllowed: Pickup orders do not require a DHL shipping label.
dhl.validateShipmentSuccess: DHL shipment successfully validated. No label was created.
dhl.previewNoLabelYet: No label has been created yet.
dhl.previewNoCosts: No DHL costs have been incurred yet.
dhl.previewProductionWarning: You are creating a real DHL shipping label. This may incur shipping costs on your DHL business customer contract.
dhl.previewSandboxInfo: Create sandbox label – no real costs.
dhl.countryNotSupportedForProduct: DHL Paket National is only available for shipments within Germany

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.draftNotice: This privacy policy is a draft and must be reviewed by a lawyer before publication.
privacy.draftStatus: STATUS: DRAFT – Do not publish without legal review!
privacy.section1Todo: ⚠️ TODO: Enter complete company information of the controller.
privacy.section2Content: We process the following personal data:
privacy.dataType1: User account data (email, name, password hash, phone number)
privacy.dataType3: Order data (delivery address, billing address, payment method)
privacy.dataType5: Server logs (IP address, user agent, timestamp)
privacy.section3Content: Your data is processed exclusively for providing our services, processing orders, and fulfilling legal obligations.
privacy.section4Content: Our servers are hosted at IONOS SE (Germany). A data processing agreement according to Art. 28 GDPR has been concluded with IONOS.
privacy.hostingContent: Elgendorfer Str. 57, 56410 Montabaur, Germany. Server location: EU/EEA.
privacy.right1Desc: You can request information about your stored data.
privacy.right2Desc: You can have incorrect data corrected.
privacy.right3Desc: You can request the deletion of your data (unless there are retention obligations).
privacy.right4Desc: You can request the restriction of processing.
privacy.right5Desc: You can receive your data in a machine-readable format.
privacy.section6Content: We implement technical and organizational security measures (HTTPS/TLS, password hashing with bcrypt, role-based access control).
privacy.section7Todo: ⚠️ TODO: Enter contact email for data protection inquiries.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.draftNotice: These terms and conditions are a draft and must be reviewed by a lawyer before publication.
terms.draftStatus: STATUS: DRAFT – Do not publish without legal review!
terms.section1Content: These general terms and conditions apply to all contracts for the use of the markt.ma platform.
terms.section2Content: markt.ma is a multi-tenant e-commerce platform. We offer the following services:
terms.service1: Provision of an online store solution (SaaS)
terms.service4: Additional features (AI product generation, Telegram import, etc.)
terms.section3Content: To use our services, you must register. You agree to provide truthful information.
terms.registrationDesc: You are responsible for the security of your account. Never share your password with third parties.
terms.section4Todo: ⚠️ TODO: Define pricing model and payment terms.
terms.obligation1: Not upload or distribute illegal content
terms.obligation3: Not publish fake or misleading product information
terms.obligation4: Not misuse the platform for fraudulent purposes
terms.section6Content: We are only liable for intent and gross negligence. Liability for slight negligence is excluded (as far as legally permissible).
terms.section7Content: Both parties can terminate the contract at any time with a notice period of [TODO: Enter notice period]. The right to extraordinary termination remains unaffected.
terms.section8Content: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with our privacy policy.
terms.section9Todo: ⚠️ TODO: Define applicable law and jurisdiction (e.g. German law, jurisdiction Munich).

woocommerce.enabledHint: Enable import functionality for this shop
woocommerce.secretKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep existing secret
woocommerce.secretHint: WooCommerce REST API credentials from WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → REST API

error.apiNotFound: WooCommerce REST API not found (404). Check shop URL.
error.shopError: WooCommerce shop error (5xx). Server may be offline.
error.rateLimitExceeded: Rate limit exceeded (429). Please try again later.
error.connectionTimeout: Connection timeout. Check shop URL and network.
error.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields

woocommerce.shopUrlHint: The full URL of your WooCommerce shop (e.g. https://example.com)
woocommerce.importDoesNotModifyWooCommerce: ℹ️ The import only copies products to markt.ma. Your WooCommerce shop will not be modified.
woocommerce.previewHint: Shows the first 20 products that would be imported
woocommerce.importComingSoonHint: The actual import will be implemented in Phase 2B. Currently you can test the configuration and load a preview of products.
woocommerce.subtitle: Import products from your WooCommerce shop

cleanup.title: Clean WooCommerce Descriptions
cleanup.description: Converts HTML product descriptions to readable text
cleanup.noAffectedProducts: No products with HTML tags found
cleanup.accessDenied: Access denied. You don't have permission for this store.
cleanup.confirmMessage: This action will permanently modify product descriptions.
cleanup.confirmNote: Prices, images, variants, and categories will not be changed.

email.dailyLimit: Daily email limit reached. Please try again in 24 hours.
email.temporarilyUnavailable: Email could not be sent. Please try again later.
email.configurationError: Email service is currently unavailable. Please contact support.
email.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes.
email.serviceDisabled: Email sending is disabled in this environment.
email.accountCreatedMailFailed: Account created successfully. The confirmation email could not be sent at this time.

help.dailyLimit: The sending limit will automatically reset after 24 hours.
help.rateLimitExceeded: Please wait a few minutes before trying again.

teamInvitation.inviteCreatedMailFailed: Invitation created, but the email could not be sent at this time
teamInvitation.resendMailFailed: Invitation updated, but email could not be sent
